channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump joins tariff talks with Japan as US seeks deals amid trade wars
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Wednesday inserted himself directly into trade talks with Japanese officials, a sign of the high stakes for the United States after its tariffs rattled the economy and caused the administration to assure the public that it would quickly reach deals.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, MARI YAMAGUCHI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump hosts faith leaders for Easter prayer dinner, slams effort to rid America of Christian principles
item.description: President Donald Trump participated in an Easter prayer service and dinner Wednesday night with several members of various faith communities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP Rep. Elise Stefanik is considering a run for governor of New York
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rep. Elise Stefanik, a member of House Republican leadership and onetime nominee for U.S. ambassador to the United Nations, is considering a run for New York governor, according to a person close to her. The person was granted anonymity to discuss internal deliberations.
item.dc:creator: SEUNG MIN KIM and ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IRS asked to revoke Harvard's tax-exempt status
item.description: Only the IRS can review and revoke the existing status of taxpaying entities and has traditionally done so without presidential interference, as mandated by tax laws.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Head Start funding lags by nearly $1 billion this year, causing some preschool closures
item.description: Head Start centers across the U.S. have received nearly $1 billion less in federal money compared with this time last year — and a lag in funding this week has caused some preschool classrooms for low-income children to close.
item.dc:creator: CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Boasberg V. Trump
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump administration, Capitol Hill and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NY AG James referred to DOJ for alleged mortgage fraud
item.description: If proven, the claims could lead to prosecution for one of New York’s highest-ranking officials, who has long argued that “no one is above the law.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Newsom says California will sue over Trump tariffs
item.description: “President Trump’s unlawful tariffs are wreaking chaos on California families, businesses, and our economy — driving up prices and threatening jobs," Newsom said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Protest of Lombardo's 'freeloaders' comment planned Saturday in downtown Las Vegas
item.description: A rally planned Saturday afternoon in downtown Las Vegas is stepping up the pushback against Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo's remarks that freeloaders are behind opposition to policy changes.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US imposes sanctions on a Chinese refinery accused of buying Iranian oil
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Treasury Department imposed sanctions Wednesday on a Chinese refinery accused of purchasing more than $1 billion worth of Iranian oil, saying the proceeds help finance both Tehran's government and Iran's support for militant groups.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The State Department closes the office that flags disinformation from Russia, China and Iran
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The State Department has shut down its office that sought to deal with misinformation and disinformation that Russia, China and Iran have been accused of spreading.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge finds probable cause to hold Trump administration in contempt for violating deportation order
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge on Wednesday said he has found probable cause to hold the Trump administration in criminal contempt of court for violating his orders last month to turn around planes carrying deportees to an El Salvador prison. The ruling from U.S District Judge James E.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Powerful House leadership chair, Stefanik poised to take on Hochul for NY governor
item.description: New York GOP Rep. Elise Stefanik is considering a bid for governor in 2026, multiple sources close to her confirmed to Fox News Digital following a Wall Street Journal report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bipartisan senators push tougher penalties for foreign-backed crimes on US soil
item.description: Sens. Joni Ernst, Elissa Slotkin, Jim Banks and Maggie Hassan introduced the DETERRENCE Act to crack down on plots targeting U.S. citizens taken up by foreign governments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JD Vance gears up to talk economic priorities during trips to Italy, India
item.description: Vance and the second family are poised to meet with and “discuss shared economic and geopolitical priorities with leaders in each country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Longtime Trump foe Letitia James reviewing possible insider trading over president's tariff pause
item.description: New York Attorney General Letitia James is reviewing whether President Donald Trump or his associates benefited from advance knowledge of a tariff pause that sent markets soaring.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top Trump officials will hold talks with Europeans on the Russia-Ukraine war
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Steve Witkoff, President Donald Trump’s special envoy, will travel to Paris this week for talks with European allies on U.S. efforts to negotiate a peace deal between Russia and Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: EPA chief takes on Mexican 'sewage crisis' flowing into US waters where Navy SEALs train
item.description: EPA administrator Lee Zeldin is expected to visit San Diego Tuesday to view the Tijuana sewage problem leaking into US waters and meet with Navy SEALs who train there.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump eyes major cuts to NOAA research
item.description: The Trump administration is eyeing cuts to climate, weather and ocean research in a draft budget blueprint for the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Bondi appoints new interim U.S. Attorney for San Diego, Imperial counties
item.description: The Southern District of California will have a new U.S attorney after Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed a longtime San Diego prosecutor to take over the role as the region's top federal law enforcement official following Tara McGrath's termination.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about Dan Caine, the nation's newly-confirmed top military adviser
item.description: The Senate voted around 2 a.m. Friday to confirm retired Air Force Lt. Gen. Dan Caine as chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. Trump plucked him from retirement to be his top military adviser.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, Juliana Kim, and Tom Bowman, MPR News

item.title: Las Vegas movie studio plan changing with new players, tech/education emphasis
item.description: A global player, MBS Group, is stepping into the plan for a $900 million movie studio at the UNLV Harry Reid Research and Technology Park, near the 215 Beltway and Durango Drive in the southwest Las Vegas valley. Birtcher Development LLC is the project's developer.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump orders agencies to ‘sunset’ environmental protections
item.description: President Trump directed agencies that regulate energy and the environment to sunset a wide array of environmental protections in an executive order issued Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada Legislature moving bills as Friday deadline nears; ghost kitchens, open enrollment among winners
item.description: Up against a Friday deadline for bills to be passed out of committee, Nevada lawmakers are working this week to move mountains of legislation in Carson City.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Public bathroom access in NYC to be voted on by City Council
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Knowing where the closest bathroom is in New York City can be a challenge, but a new City Council bill may change that. Councilmember Sandy Nurse is leading the push to expand public bathroom access.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11
